value.value: Only an assigned staff member can confirm
Shift end must be after shift start
Cannot change role for completed assignment
Staff member must be assigned or confirmed to check in
Staff member must be checked in to check out
Can only mark a no-show for staff who never checked in
Cannot unassign a staff member who has already checked in

policies.name: EventStaffManagement
policies.message: Event coordinators and above can manage event staff
